title: Time tracking based on user, not item
excerpt:
Hi! 
Would be super helpful to use time tracking for single users, not items. That is to say, within a single board / workspace, a user should only be able to track time on a single activity at a time.

posts.author: Vania_Omnidea (Vania Buso)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Would be super helpful to use time tracking for single users, not items. That is to say, within a single board / workspace, a user should only be able to track time on a single activity at a time.

posts.author: dkalsow (Dale Kalsow)
posts.cookedHtml: As far as I know you need a task in monday to be able to tie time to. However, you could create a specific task where you have the user track all their time against.
